commit.message:
Fix kaliscan titles: derive from URL slug when title is NULL

Records imported without a title fall back to _title_from_url() which
includes the numeric ID from the slug (e.g. "29119 Am I Invincible").
Migration now also backfills title from the slug with the prefix stripped
for all kaliscan records where title IS NULL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix netwatch not found after install by persisting PATH in shell profile

The install function exported ~/.local/bin to PATH for the current
session only. Now it appends the export to ~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc, or
~/.profile so the netwatch command is available in new terminals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add scheduled events management page

New /admin/events page showing all cron events grouped by channel.

duplicate firing issues by showing all events per channel.

commit.message:
fix: migrations 035+041 FK violations blocking 036-043 from applying

Root cause: 035 used 'dr-evan-shoul' (wrong) and 'gillian-pearson' (not in
clients table), causing FK constraint failures → migrate.py sys.exit(1) →
all migrations 036-043 never applied → device_lifecycle table missing.

Fixes:
- 035: use correct client_id 'evan-shoul', remove gillian-pearson rows
- 041: remove gillian-pearson rows (same FK issue)
- 044: new migration — seeds gillian-pearson client record first,
  then inserts her automated_interventions safely

After this deploy: migrations 036-043 will apply for the first time,
creating device_lifecycle, physical_assessment, sales_proposals,
post_repair_sequences, and Phase 26 device_metrics columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add theme system with 3 theme variants

Implemented a clean, working theme system with:
- 3 theme variants: Dark (default), Light, Midnight
- ThemeSwitcher component with dropdown UI in top bar
- Theme persistence using localStorage
- Simplified implementation using local const C in App component
- No prop drilling required - module-level C provides fallback

Theme colors dynamically update the entire UI including:
- Backgrounds, text, borders
- Navigation colors
- All content sections
- Scrollbar styling

This implementation avoids the white screen issue by keeping
component definitions using the module-level C constant.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Fix Railway deployment: wrap startCommand in shell to expand \$PORT

so \$PORT is passed as a literal string. Using sh -c ensures variable expansion.

fix: CI checks run independently, complexipy annotations strip ./ prefix

- Split task python:ci into separate steps so all tools run even if ruff fails
- complexipy: drop hardcoded -mx 15, read threshold from pyproject.toml instead
- complexipy annotations: strip ./ prefix from file paths so GitHub maps them correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: cloudy.local works without port number

- `trySetupPortForward(port)` in setup.ts: pfctl anchor + LaunchDaemon
  on macOS, iptables + optional systemd unit on Linux, netsh portproxy
  on Windows — all forward port 80 → daemon port
- `cloudy setup` interactive wizard now offers port forward setup after
  cloudy.local hostname step; `--setup-port-forward` flag for CI
- `cloudy daemon start --boot` also installs port forward automatically
- `cloudy daemon status` and `daemon open` show http://cloudy.local when
  port forward is active, with http://localhost:PORT as fallback URL
- `cloudy run` dashboard open shows same friendly + tech URL pair
- install.sh: cross-platform (macOS pfctl / Linux iptables); --boot
  persists iptables rule via systemd on Linux
- install.ps1: Windows PowerShell installer using netsh portproxy

commit.message:
policy: change data retention from 30-day TTL to indefinite

Remove KV_TTL constant and all expirationTtl options from KV put()
calls. Cloudflare KV stores data permanently by default when no
expiration is set.

DATA RETENTION POLICY: Indefinite (Updated 2026-03-09)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 1 & 2 optimization — security hardening, performance, and mobile UX

Phase 1 (Security):
- S1: Ownership verification on journal/devotional PATCH/DELETE
- S2: File upload validation (MIME whitelist, 10MB limit, filename sanitize)
- S3: Zod input validation on auth endpoints (register/login/change-password)
- S4: Rate limiting (global 100/15min, auth 10/15min)
- S5: Helmet security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) + 1MB payload limit
- M12: useMemo on OfflineSyncProvider context value
- M17: touch-action: manipulation for interactive elements

Phase 2 (Performance):
- P1: React.lazy code splitting for all pages (bundle -80%)
- P3: Vite manual chunks (leaflet, recharts, framer-motion)
- P5: staleTime Infinity → 5min
- P6: SW API cache 24h → 5min, timeout 5s → 10s
- M1: Network polling 10s → 30s
- M2: GPS default low accuracy
- M3: Location refetch 30s → 60s
- M5: Removed Header backdrop-blur
- M6: Removed BottomNav backdrop-blur + heavy shadow
- M10: Auth session check 3s timeout
- D1-D2: 19 database indexes on foreign keys

Fix NullRef in constructor and IOException when exe is locked by service

  constructor — SelectionChanged fires during Items.Add, hitting null
  _credentialPersistTimer. Also suppress credential persistence during
  initial ComboBox setup.
- Handle IOException in EnsureInstalledAndRelaunchIfNeeded when the
  canonical exe is locked by the running service — stop the service
  first, then retry the copy.
- Show full stack trace in startup error dialog and write crash log
  to temp directory for remote diagnostics.

commit.message:
Add full CLI subcommands for LLM/scripting control

Expose all UI features as CLI subcommands so LLMs with terminal access
and power users can script the full workflow: sets, mappings, sync,
watch, snapshots, collect, locks, and config. Every command supports
--json for machine-readable output.

New file: cli.py (~600 lines)
Modified: watchfolder.py main() for subcommand dispatch
All legacy flags (--folder/-f, --layer/-l, --watch) remain compatible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 설정 정리 + 모바일 전용 기능 추가

- 구현 불가 설정 제거 (인지화질/HDR/터보/병렬압축/원본삭제/압축엔진)
- 모바일 기능 추가: 로컬 알림, 기기 저장 공간 표시, 압축 후 공유
- historyStore 신규 생성 (압축 이력 영구 저장, 통계, 날짜별 그룹핑)
- 홈/이력 화면 실데이터 연결 (하드코딩 제거)
- 로그인 화면 UI 개선 (Bungee 폰트, 검정 로고, 버튼 통일)
- 라이트모드 텍스트 색상 수정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(thread-brain): stream output per-turn instead of buffering to exit

Switch claude invocation from --output-format text to stream-json.
Parse each stdout line as JSON; forward type=assistant turns to the
Matrix thread immediately as they arrive. Fallback to type=result if
no assistant turns were emitted, and to a "no output" notice if neither
appeared. Eliminates 3-5 minute silence by posting each turn in real time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add multi-agent self-play training and adaptive payoff games

Implements self-play training infrastructure (FrozenOpponent, OpponentPool,
SelfPlayTrainer) with GRPO integration, and 5 adaptive game factories with
history-dependent payoff functions (adaptive PD, arms race, trust erosion,
market dynamics, reputation payoffs). Extends TrajectoryCollector with
opponent_fn support and adds GAME_FACTORIES registry to games.py.

commit.message:
Add HTTPS/nginx, templates UI, multi-doc generation, and Clio OAuth fixes

- Clio OAuth: fixed /clio/connect to accept token query param; callback
  redirects to FRONTEND_URL env var instead of hardcoded localhost
- config.py: added frontend_url and production-safe env var defaults
- docker-compose: nginx service, pgvector image, env vars for URLs
- Templates API: GET/POST /api/templates, GET /api/templates/{key}/download
- Templates page: list all 17 templates with auth-aware download + upload
- Documents page: fixed download to use Bearer auth (blob fetch)
- Wizard: generates ALL selected documents via Promise.allSettled +
  resolveDocumentType() mapper; pregnancy clause as explicit Yes/No

- lib/api.ts: listTemplates, downloadTemplate, uploadTemplate helpers
